mapper.select:
select collect.*, user.name as userName, article.title as title from `collect` left join `user` on `collect`.user_id = `user`.id left join `article` on `collect`.fid = `article`.id
and user.name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%') and user.id = #{userId} and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
order by id desc

select collect.*, user.name as userName, article.title as title from `collect` left join `user` on `collect`.user_id = `user`.id left join `article` on `collect`.fid = `article`.id
and user.name like concat('%', #{query.userName}, '%') and user.id = #{query.userId} and title like concat('%', #{query.title}, '%')
order by id desc
